title: Ea Nasir's Items and Bosses Pack
description: Introduces new bosses, items, and more!
body:
A ton of new adventure, danger, and items for you to utilize or fight.

## Overview
- Several New Bosses
- Powerful Weaponry
- New Enchants
- New Cosmetic Enchants
- Boss Structures
- New Recipes
- A New Menu
- Quality of Life Features
- Vanity Accessories

## Breakdown of Content
### Bosses
All bosses drop loot for everybody. Trial Bosses (bosses in structures) give equal loot to everybody participating in the fight. Spawned Bosses (Spawner items) grant the player who spawned them a loot chest, while everybody else participating in the fight gets a participation rewards out of a trial chamber, which is a lesser version of the main drop table with lower chances to drop rare drops.
- Warden
  - The Warden now is a more fleshed out boss with his sonic boom being dodgable.
  - Drops:
    - 1x Sculk Shrieker, 1.25% Chance to drop **Sonic Sniper**, 5% Chance to drop an accessory.
- Wither and Wither Rider
  - A stronger Wither that has a wither skeleton skeleton riding him.
  - Drops: 1x **Withered Tome**. 1% Chance to drop a **Wither Rider Sword**.
- Copper Guardian
  - A Zombie-Guardian Hybrid that wields a powerful mace.
  - Drops: 1-4 **Armed-Armor Stands**. 1% chance to drop **Lightning Mace** enchant. (Per Player at the Fight.)
- Ender Knight
  - A knight in the end protecting an egg wielding his **Ender Knight Spear** and a Shield.
  - Drops: 1x **Enderman Hatchling**. 1% chance to drop **Ender Knight Spear**. (Per Player at the Fight.)
- Primordial Idol of Change:
  - An ancient idol from deep below that rises once more to fight.
  - Drops: 1-4 **Primordial Cubes**, 3-10 Netherite Scrap, 9-30 Wither Skeleton Skulls, 8-80 Diamonds.
  
### Loot Table Changes
- Evokers: Have a 0.5% Chance to drop an **Evoker Tome**.
- Blazes: Have a 0.33% Chance to drop an **Ember Rod**.
- Zombies: Have a 1% Chance to drop a **Undead Manifestation**.
  
### Items
- Sonic Sniper Enchant: A Bow Enchant that 3x your arrow's speed, overall doubling its damage. You must be sneaking and grounded to fire a sonic arrow. The arrow can kill an enderman if shot precisely.
- Wither Rider Sword: A normal Netherite Sword with the added ability of wither skulls! On right click, fires a wither skeleton skull towards where you are looking. (8 Second Cooldown.)
- Withered Tome: A tome that enables usage of the **Change Item Skin** button in the **Goods of Nasir Co. Menu**.
- Armed-Armor Stand: An Armor Stand with it's arms (Mainhand) enabled!
- Lightning Mace Enchant: An enchantment book that is applied to maces. When you land an attack falling from higher than 3 blocks on a mob, you tag them with lightning to strike on them after 2 seconds.
- Enderman Hatchling: An Enderman Spawn Egg that spawns a slightly smaller enderman. Mainly a crafting ingredient for **Play the Primordial**.
- Ender Knight Spear: A Netherite Spear that looks diamond. On right click, fires an ender pearl forwards while still maintaining it's charging ability. (5 Second Cooldown.)
- Primordial Cube: A Netherite Cube that, when consumed, changes a piece of your armor into the look of another piece of armor thats in your offhand.
- Ember Rod: A Blaze Rod with the abilities to fire small or big fireballs! Holding right click with blaze powder in your inventory fires a continuous stream of small fireballs towards your crosshair, consuming blaze powder as it goes. Shift right clicking consumes 2 blaze rods while firing a powerful fireball that explodes its surroundings. (10 Second Cooldown.)
- Evoker Tome: A Tome inbued with the power to fire evoker fangs in a circle or directly forwards. (0.5 Second Cooldown and 1.5 Second Cooldown Respectively.)
- Wither Spawn Egg: Spawns a Wither without its charge up time. Mainly a crafting ingredient for **Wither and Wither Rider Spawn Egg**.
- Wither and Wither Rider Spawn Egg: Spawns the Wither and Wither Rider Boss Fight.
- Play the Primordial: Spawns the Primordial Idol of Change Boss Fight.
- 4D Dragon Egg: Consumed to destroy everything around you. (DO NOT USE THIS ITEM IF YOU WANT TO LIVE, AND IF YOU DON'T WANT WHAT IS AROUND TO BE UTTERLY DECIMATED.)
- End Alter Locater: Locates an End Alter.
- Trial Monument Locater: Locates a Trial Monument.
- Barrel Mover: Allows moving of a barrel.
- Recall Potion: Teleports you back to your set spawnpoint.
- Wormhole Potion: Teleports you to another player that has a wormhole potion in their offhand.

### Accessories
Accessories are vanity items that display effects around the player who has them in their inventory.
Accessory Types:
  - Electric Copper Block (Copper): Display electricity around you.
  - Ender Soul (Ender): Displays end rod effect around you.
  - Withered Soul (Wither): Displays souls effect around you.
  - Darkened Sculk (Warden): Display a vibration towards 0,0.
  - Primordial Mind (Primordial): Displays flames and enchanted weapon effect around you.
  - The Overseer (Overseer): Display shiny wax and enchant effect around you.
  
### Recipes
- Nametag: 1x Leather and 1x Iron Ingot.
- Barrel Mover: 3x String, 1x Stick, 1x Copper Ingot.
- Recall Potion: 3x Soul Sand, 1x Water Bottle (or Potion), 1x Ender Pearl.
- Wormhole Potion: 3x Diamond, 1x Water Bottle (or Potion), 1x Eye of Ender.
- Wither Spawn Egg: 4x Soul Sand, 3x Wither Skull.
- Wither and Wither Rider Spawn Egg: 1x Wither Spawn Egg, 1x Netherite Ingot.
- End Alter/Trial Monument Locater: 4x Ender Pearl, 1x Compass.
- Dragon Egg: 1x **Enderman Hatchling** (Enderman Spawn Egg), 1x Sculk Catalyst, 2x Nether Star, 1x Netherite Ingot.
- 4D Dragon Egg: 9x Dragon Egg.
- Play the Primordial: 1x Rib Armor Trim, 1x Flow Armor Trim, 1x Spire Armor Trim, 1x Dune Armor Trim, 1x Vex Armor Trim, 1x Wild Armor Trim, 1x Tide Armor Trim, 1x Silence Armor Trim, 1x Dragon Egg.
  
### Structures
- End Alter: Rarely found in the End. Arena for the **Ender Knight**.
- Trial Monument: Moderately rarely found in Oceans. Arena for the **Copper Guardian**.

### Everything Else
- Goods of Nasir Co. Menu: A Menu that allows for the usage of item renaming with nametags, and item reskinning with **Withered Tomes**.
- Item Renaming: In the **Goods of Nasir Co. Menu**, pressing this button renames your item with the choice of italicization.
- Item Reskinning: In the **Goods of Nasir Co. Menu**, pressing this button reskins your held item to your offhanded item's skin. Needs a **Withered Tome** to function.
- Armor Reskinning: Consuming a **Primordial Cube** allows an armor piece to look like the armor piece in your offhand. (Example: Wearing a Netherite Chestplate, consuming the cube with a diamond chestplate in your offhand changes the Netherite Chestplate's Skin to the Diamond Chestplate's Skin. Both pieces of armor must be the same type to work (i.e. leggings and leggings, chestplates and chestplates). Leather armor must be dyed first in your offhand to change the armor piece you are currently wearing's color.)
